title: DexKo names new CEO amid leadership transition
description:
Novi, Michigan-based DexKo Global Inc., the parent of Elkhart-based Dexter, has named Eric McGinnis as its new CEO. His predecessor, Fred Bentley, will transition to chairman of the board, the company announced Monday.

title: Indiana Supreme Court hands casinos win, clarifies tax add-back law
description:
The Indiana Supreme Court last week narrowed the state’s income tax add-back requirements for casinos, preventing the Department of Revenue from inflating taxable income with unapportioned gaming taxes.

title: Butler receives $1.1M to support Jordan College of the Arts
description:
Ronald Caltabiano said he hopes his gift will fuel the entrepreneurial spirit he found prevalent throughout campus while he served as dean of the Jordan College of the Arts from 2011-2016.

title: Planned Parenthood decries block on Indiana Medicaid funding despite end of federal ban
description:
Indiana’s Planned Parenthood affiliate remains cut off from state Medicaid funding even with the expiration of a federal ban on such payments to abortion providers for any healthcare services.

title: EPA awards $6.1M for Indiana brownfield cleanup projects
description:
The U.S. Environmental Protection Agency recently announced it will invest $6.1 million to help Indiana communities assess, clean up and redevelop contaminated brownfield properties.

title: Nearly a third of Indiana counties have moved to restrict data centers
description:
Moratoriums on data center developments have become a popular stopgap for communities as they figure out what local regulations could look like for data centers as tech companies propose developments across the state.

description:
